title: Continuum Asset Candidates
summary: Scripts, video-logo briefs, music cues, and reusable sting ideas for choosing the next real AdLib assets.
selectionNote: Tick the assets worth making real. Field Relay voice candidates are Lily-only because the previous voice felt wrong.

items.angle: fast session capture without pretending it is a safety system
items.voiceDirection: Lily only. Warm, clear, practical, not sci-fi spooky.
items.title: Field Relay - Water Sports 15s
items.scriptText:
Your hands are on the wing. Your head is in the wind.

Field Relay is a talkable assistant for session notes, kit checks, repairs, and ideas you do not want to lose.

Not a safety system. A field computer for busy hands.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Keep the pace energetic. Add water, wind, board bag zip, and one clean notification sound.

items.voiceDirection: Lily only. Competent marina voice, not dramatic.
items.title: Field Relay - Sailing 30s
items.scriptText:
On a boat, the useful thought usually arrives when both hands are busy.

Field Relay is a talkable command surface for notes, checklists, fixes, kit lists, and agent tools.

Mark the sail change. Save the repair note. Start the packing checklist. Hand the job to your own agent when you get ashore.

Always ready does not mean always recording.

Field Relay.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Use marina halyards, soft hull slap, and a clean radio chirp under the brand line.

items.audience: people whose hands and eyes are busy
items.voiceDirection: Lily only. Friendly, useful, quietly futuristic.
items.title: Field Relay - Hands Free 30s
items.scriptText:
Some jobs do not wait while you unlock a laptop.

Field Relay is for people whose hands and eyes are busy: a talkable notebook, checklist, command line, and tool launcher for the real world.

Save the note. Start the capture. Run the checklist. Call the tool. Let your own agent pick up the work.

Field Relay.

A tricorder you can talk to.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: This is the main clean product pitch. Re-record older Field Relay reads with this voice direction first.

items.voiceDirection: Lily only. Plain-spoken, not posh, not rural cosplay.
items.title: Field Relay - Farmer's Assistant 30s
items.scriptText:
The best farm note is usually made nowhere near a desk.

Field Relay is a talkable assistant for land work: notes, reminders, checklists, photos, repairs, places, and jobs to send back to your agent.

Gate needs fixing. Pump sounded wrong. Move the trough. Check that field again on Thursday.

Say it while the work is still in front of you.

Field Relay.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Use boots on gravel, gate latch, distant birds. Avoid comic farmer voice.

items.voiceDirection: Lily only. Straight narrator over ridiculous SFX.
items.title: Field Relay - Pirate Crew 20s
items.scriptText:
That captain is amazing.

He can remember where he has hidden his treasure, even though he has got two hooks and two eye patches.

Aye. That is because he uses Field Relay.

There she blows! Avast!

Field Relay: notes and commands for crews with busy hands.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Use creaking rope, splash, distant gull, tiny cannon pop. Lily stays dry and deadpan. Later version can split the pirate lines into character voices if Lily-only is too flat.

items.title: Field Relay - Mums 30s
items.scriptText:
Some people call it multitasking. Some people call it Tuesday.

Packed lunch. Wet kit. Lost form. Football boots. Dentist. Birthday present. That one thing you remembered in the car and lost by the time you got home.

Field Relay is a talkable assistant for busy hands, busy eyes, and brains already doing too much.

Say it. Save it. Send it to the right list.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: No mumsy stereotype. Use real domestic rhythm: keys, car door, school bag zip, calm ending.

items.title: Field Relay - Bring Your Own Agent 30s
items.scriptText:
Field Relay is not meant to be one fixed app with one fixed brain.

It is a command surface for the real world: notes, captures, checklists, and tools that your own agent can learn to handle.

Add commands. Add workflows. Build the tools that fit your work, not someone else's dashboard.

Field Relay.

Bring your own agent into the field.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to fieldrelay.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Good candidate for developer channels. Keep SFX subtle.

items.angle: learn to use AI as a business-building workshop
items.voiceDirection: Lily preferred. Clear, modern, not guru.
items.title: AI Developer School - Founder 15s
items.scriptText:
The new programming language is human language.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School is for founders who want to wrangle agents, build adverts, prototype products, and think like AI entrepreneurs.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to school.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Good first audio test for this product. Keep it direct and practical.

items.audience: people with product ideas but no shipping rhythm
items.angle: turn messy ideas into demos, adverts, and feedback
items.voiceDirection: Lily preferred. Encouraging, but not inspirational fluff.
items.title: AI Developer School - Docs To Demo 30s
items.scriptText:
The new programming language is human language.

But useful AI work still needs taste, structure, feedback loops, and the nerve to make small useful things quickly.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School teaches the practical stack: product truth, agent wrangling, advert writing, prototype loops, and shipping before the idea goes stale.

Build the thing. Explain the thing. Test the thing.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to school.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: This is the clearest offer. Could become the default 30 second advert.

items.audience: entrepreneurs who want to build with AI agents
items.voiceDirection: Lily preferred. Confident teacher, not sales bro.
items.title: AI Developer School - Agent Wrangler 60s
items.scriptText:
The new programming language is human language.

That does not mean the work is easy. It means the founder skill has changed.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School is a practical course for people who want to build products, adverts, workflows, and prototypes with AI agents.

You learn how to turn a messy idea into product truth. How to brief an agent. How to judge the work. How to make fast adverts. How to build feedback loops. How to ship a rough version before the energy disappears.

This is not about pretending AI is magic. It is about becoming the person who can point it at a real opportunity and keep it honest long enough to make something useful.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School.

Wrangle the agents. Build the business.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to school.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Use for the long host-read concept. May need trimming after first listen.

items.title: AI Developer School - Wrangle The Agents Sting
items.scriptText:
The new programming language is human language.

Wrangle the agents. Build the business.

school.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Useful as a podcast bumper or video end card.

items.title: AI Developer School - Build Test Sell Sting
items.scriptText:
Build it. Explain it. Test it. Sell it.

Entrepreneurs AI Developer School.

school.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Could sit under upbeat synth ticks and a keyboard flourish.

items.voiceDirection: Lily preferred. Kind, not medical, not patronising.
items.title: Continuum - Brain Like A Sieve 30s
items.scriptText:
Some people do not have a lack of ideas. They have too many ideas arriving sideways.

Continuum Kit is for builders with brilliant, leaky, high-speed brains: people who need a way to capture the thread, recover the context, and keep moving without turning life into admin.

It is not a finished one-click product yet. It is a practical workflow being extracted from real use.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Keep the admission that it is not finished. That makes the copy believable.

items.audience: independent thinkers, solo builders, local-first people
items.title: Continuum - Genius Chaos 30s
items.scriptText:
If your brain makes connections faster than your systems can hold them, you do not need another productivity religion.

You need a way back into the work.

Continuum Kit is a public-safe path out of a private AI workflow: capture, context, agents, decisions, and next actions in language that belongs to you.

For people who think in storms and still need to ship.

Go to continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Strong identity ad. Avoid claiming a finished download.

items.title: Continuum - Context Recovery 15s
items.scriptText:
Context lost? Thread gone? Brain moved on?

Continuum Kit is about building a workflow that helps you and your agents find the work again.

Capture the thread. Recover the context. Keep moving.

Go to continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Could be useful as a fast intro before technical videos.

items.angle: Taskmaster-like nautical chaos, clearly a concept
items.voiceDirection: Lily or comic host. Lily can read straight over silly SFX.
items.title: Jury Rigged - Show Trailer 30s
items.scriptText:
Teams. Puzzles. Questionable materials. A final race that should probably have had more planning.

Jury Rigged is a new challenge-show concept where crews earn advantages, find hidden parts, build ridiculous solutions, and try to get across the water with dignity mostly intact.

It is part game show, part boatyard experiment, part pirate homework.

Jury Rigged.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to juryrigged.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Add hornpipe energy, rope hits, splash, crowd laugh. Keep safety review internal.

items.angle: tool for run sheets and edit planning
items.title: Jury Rigged - Creator Tool 30s
items.scriptText:
A good challenge video is not just chaos. It is planned chaos.

Jury Rigged is a concept for turning physical challenge ideas into run sheets, safety limits, scoring rules, shot lists, edit beats, and story structure.

Design the puzzle. Capture the best moments. Make the mayhem watchable.

Jury Rigged.

Part of the Continuum family.

Go to juryrigged.continuumkit.org.
items.productionNotes: Use this for the product/tool angle rather than the show trailer.

items.title: Jury Rigged - Main Hornpipe Theme
items.audioBrief: Fast comic hornpipe or jig. Fiddle or concertina lead, stomping hand percussion, rope creaks, tiny cannon thump, and a big final logo hit. Should feel like a nautical game show, not a historical drama.
items.productionNotes: Make 20s, 10s, 5s, and clean logo-hit versions from the same motif.

items.title: Jury Rigged - Captain's Bad Idea Sting
items.audioBrief: Two fiddle notes up, record scratch, tiny cannon pop, splash. Optional dry voice: Captain's bad idea.
items.productionNotes: Reusable whenever a team does something obviously doomed.

items.title: Jury Rigged - Advantage Earned Sting
items.audioBrief: Bright fiddle flourish, coin clink, wooden stamp hit, short cheer. Optional voice: Advantage earned.
items.productionNotes: Should sound rewarding but still silly.

items.angle: useful part found in plain sight
items.title: Jury Rigged - Hidden Part Reveal
items.audioBrief: Muted drum roll, spyglass click, harp glint, then a wooden thunk. Optional voice: In plain sight.
items.productionNotes: Good for visual zooms to hidden rope, sail, pulley, or float.

items.title: Jury Rigged - Plank Splash
items.audioBrief: Rope twang, wobbling wood creak, body-safe splash, one forlorn concertina note.
items.productionNotes: Make a dry version and a wet version.

items.audience: AdLib videos and audio advert reels
items.title: AdLib Logo - Docs To Waveform
items.visualBrief: A stack of plain document pages slides in, the lines compress into a clean waveform, then the AdLib wordmark locks on with a small glint on the final letter.
items.audioBrief: Paper flick, soft tape-start, warm single-note logo hit.
items.productionNotes: Use as the default AdLib bumper. No voice required.

items.title: AdLib Logo - Mic Stamp
items.visualBrief: A simple microphone icon drops like a rubber stamp onto a script page. The page becomes an audio tile labelled AdLib.
items.audioBrief: Rubber stamp, tiny room tone swell, confident button click.
items.productionNotes: Make a transparent-background version for overlays.

items.title: AdLib Logo - Script To Speaker
items.visualBrief: Typed script text flows into a small speaker. The speaker pulses once, then the AdLib mark appears from the sound ring.
items.audioBrief: Keyboard ticks, low pulse, clean chime.
items.productionNotes: Good for docs-to-audio advert explainers.

items.title: Continuum Logo - Recover The Thread
items.visualBrief: Loose notes orbit the screen. One bright thread links them, pulls them into order, and resolves into the Continuum mark.
items.audioBrief: Soft scattered ticks resolving into one warm sustained note.
items.productionNotes: Useful as family-wide intro.

items.title: Continuum Logo - Context Snap
items.visualBrief: A blurred cloud of labels snaps into a crisp path. Continuum appears as the final anchor.
items.audioBrief: Reverse whoosh, neat magnetic click.
items.productionNotes: Make this clean and technical, not mystical.

items.title: Continuum Logo - Second Bootstrap
items.visualBrief: A small private workbench exports a public-safe seed. The seed grows into a different workbench shape, then the Continuum mark appears.
items.audioBrief: Two rising plucks, small mechanical unfold, warm finish.
items.productionNotes: Use for talks about not copying Peter's whole private system.

items.title: Field Relay Logo - Tricorder Scan
items.visualBrief: A scan line sweeps over mud, rope, phone, and notebook icons. The Field Relay wordmark appears as if found by the scan.
items.audioBrief: Clean scan beep, outdoor ambience, subtle confirm click.
items.productionNotes: Use on field tests and hands-free assistant demos.

items.title: Field Relay Logo - Boot To Compass
items.visualBrief: A boot print lands in mud. The print becomes a compass ring. The Field Relay mark locks to north.
items.audioBrief: Boot step, mud press, compass tick, low logo hit.
items.productionNotes: Good for farming and restoration variants.

items.title: Field Relay Logo - Radio Packet
items.visualBrief: A spoken command becomes a small packet of light that travels across the screen and lands in an agent tool tile.
items.audioBrief: Radio pip, tiny data chirp, completion click.
items.productionNotes: Useful under voice-command demos.

items.title: JobDone Logo - Job Card Snap
items.visualBrief: A messy note, phone call, and photo snap into one tidy job card. JobDone appears as the card stamps complete.
items.audioBrief: Phone tap, camera click, paper snap, practical stamp hit.
items.productionNotes: Plain and useful. Avoid magic language.

items.title: JobDone Logo - Van Door
items.visualBrief: A van door shuts. The panel line becomes the JobDone underline and the wordmark appears with a practical tick.
items.audioBrief: Van door thump, tool belt jingle, tick.
items.productionNotes: Could become a strong tradesperson channel bumper.

items.title: JobDone Logo - Voice Timeline
items.visualBrief: A voice bubble becomes a timeline of job events: call, visit, quote, photo, done. JobDone lands at the end.
items.audioBrief: Short spoken mumble texture, timeline ticks, final soft stamp.
items.productionNotes: Good for explaining recall without saying CRM.

items.title: Downwind Logo - Spin Flash
items.visualBrief: A foil-shaped logo spins once in 3D, catches a hard glint on the corner, and slams into a clean title card.
items.audioBrief: Fast wind-up, metallic glint, deep water hit.
items.productionNotes: Strongest first Downwind visual sting. No voice needed.

items.title: Downwind Logo - Breaking Wave Wipe
items.visualBrief: A clean animated wave rolls across the screen, breaks into spray, and reveals the Downwind mark with stat overlay lines fading in behind it.
items.audioBrief: Rolling water swell, crisp break, subtle HUD chirp.
items.productionNotes: Best fit for technical sports production with speed overlays.

items.title: Downwind Logo - Stick Foiler Crash
items.visualBrief: A tiny stick wing-foiler pumps confidently, overcooks it, cartwheels into the water, and the splash becomes the Downwind mark.
items.audioBrief: Tiny heroic fanfare, wobble, squeaky splash, bright logo plop.
items.productionNotes: Make several crash variants if this lands.

items.title: Jury Rigged Logo - Tool Flag
items.visualBrief: A pirate flag unfurls, but the skull is replaced by crossed tools and rope. The fabric snaps into the Jury Rigged title.
items.audioBrief: Flag snap, fiddle flourish, wooden boom.
items.productionNotes: Pair with the main hornpipe motif.

items.title: Jury Rigged Logo - Rope Knot
items.visualBrief: A loose rope whips across screen, ties itself into a terrible knot, then tightens into the Jury Rigged wordmark.
items.audioBrief: Rope whip, knot squeeze, comic twang.
items.productionNotes: Good for scene transitions.

items.title: Jury Rigged Logo - Plank Splash
items.visualBrief: A plank swings down like a title wipe. Someone just off-screen falls in. The splash draws the Jury Rigged logo.
items.audioBrief: Creak, whoop, splash, one fiddle sting.
items.productionNotes: Comedy bumper for replays and cold opens.

items.title: AI Developer School Logo - Workbench Sparks
items.visualBrief: A product note, prompt, code block, and advert card land on a workbench. Small sparks connect them into the school badge.
items.audioBrief: Keyboard tick, small solder spark, upbeat logo hit.
items.productionNotes: Make it practical and workshop-like, not futuristic haze.

items.title: AI Developer School Logo - Agent Classroom
items.visualBrief: Tiny agent cards sit at desks. A founder card walks to the front, draws a loop on the board, and the logo appears.
items.audioBrief: Chair shuffle, chalk tick, friendly class bell.
items.productionNotes: Could be charming if kept simple.

items.title: AI Developer School Logo - Build Test Sell
items.visualBrief: Three tiles flip in order: Build, Test, Sell. They stack into the school badge.
items.audioBrief: Three tight clicks, rising pluck, final badge hit.
items.productionNotes: Good match for the short sting script.

items.title: Living Water Logo - Ripple Map
items.visualBrief: A drop lands on a map contour. The ripple becomes a catchment line and reveals a clean Checkdam or Living Water title.
items.audioBrief: Water drop, soft earth thump, calm chime.
items.productionNotes: Do not use Continuum family line for Checkdam.

items.title: Living Water Logo - Stone Flow
items.visualBrief: Small stones drop into a stream line, water slows and spreads, then the title appears in the calmer water.
items.audioBrief: Stone taps, trickle widening, warm natural finish.
items.productionNotes: Grounded and calm. Avoid heroic fantasy tone.

items.title: Living Water Logo - Field Notebook
items.visualBrief: A wet field notebook opens. A sketch of a pond challenge animates into a simple title card.
items.audioBrief: Notebook open, pencil mark, bird call, small water sound.
items.productionNotes: Useful if Living Water Skills assets continue.
